name: Chopped Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup red and green bell peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped vegetables (onion, tomato, cucumber, red and green bell peppers, and tart apple) together in a mixing bowl.
2. In a separate container, combine the remaining ingredients: 3 1/2 tablespoons lemon juice, 1/3 cup olive oil, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Pour the mixture over the chopped vegetables and apple.
4. Toss gently to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to blend together.
